name: sidemesh
description: Fleet-first Codex session node and Flutter client.

scripts.mobile:ios:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter run --flavor dev -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:ios:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter run --flavor prod -t lib/main.dart
scripts.mobile:ios:build:dev: cd apps/mobile && flutter build ios --flavor dev --debug
scripts.mobile:ios:build:prod: cd apps/mobile && flutter build ipa --flavor prod --release
